info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Bloomberg Portfolio API

description.content:
API for portfolio management operations including portfolio construction, holdings management, risk analysis, performance attribution, and compliance monitoring for buy-side firms. Enables programmatic access to Bloomberg's portfolio analytics platform.
